pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point introducing piling and earthworks services with quick access to key tools and CTAs.
primary_functions: Highlight core services such as piling, earthworks, equipment hire, and site inspections
Provide prominent CTAs to request quotes, use the pile estimator, and book site inspections
Offer quick links into Piling Services, Earthworks Services, Equipment Hire, Projects, and Resources

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View all services' CTA or main Services navigation item
Click on 'Residential piling' feature tile
Click on 'Earthworks' feature tile
Click on 'Hire piling rigs' CTA
Click on 'View projects & case studies' CTA
Click on 'Read FAQs & guides' CTA
Click on 'Use pile estimator' primary CTA
Click on 'Book site inspection' primary CTA
Click on 'Request a quote' CTA when user is unsure of specific service

access_methods.description: Main landing page linked from the 'Home' header navigation item and company logo
Users can land directly via the root site URL

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: High-level overview of all service categories offered by the company.
primary_functions: Display main service categories (Piling, Earthworks, Retaining Walls, Site Inspections, etc.)
Allow users to navigate to detailed category pages such as Piling Services and Earthworks Services
Provide a general 'Request a Quote' CTA for users unsure which specific service they need

incoming_params.description: Optional service category code (e.g., 'piling','earthworks') to highlight when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Piling' category card
Click on the 'Earthworks' category card
Click on 'Build your earthworks package' CTA
Click on 'Book site inspection' from services overview
Click on generic 'Request a Quote' CTA after optionally submitting general quote form

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Services' item in the main header navigation
Accessible via 'Services' footer link
Linked from feature tiles and CTAs on the Home page

pages.name: Piling Services
pages.description: Category page listing all piling services with filters for project type and pile type.
primary_functions: List piling services (e.g., residential screw piling, commercial bored piles) with brief descriptions and depth capabilities
Provide filters for project type (Residential, Commercial, Industrial) and pile type/keywords (e.g., screw piles)
Allow keyword search within piling services to locate specific options such as screw piles suitable up to at least 8m depth
Link through to individual service detail pages for full information and quote requests

incoming_params.description: Optional project type to preselect in filters (e.g., 'residential','commercial','industrial').
Optional pile type to preselect (e.g., 'screw_piles','bored_piles').
Optional search query to prefill the keyword search field.
Pagination index for the piling services list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a piling service card title or 'View Details' button

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Piling Services' footer link
Linked from Services Overview and Home page service tiles

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific piling or earthworks service, including specifications and quote form.
primary_functions: Present full details of the selected service, including suitable applications, typical depths, and soil types
Show key parameters such as maximum recommended pile depth (e.g., suitable up to at least 8m)
Provide a 'Get Quote' / 'Request Quote' form with fields for project description, postcode, project type, soil type, and timeframe
Allow users to submit a tailored quote request for that specific service

incoming_params.description: Service ID used to load full service details and quote form options.

outgoing_connections.trigger: User clicks a secondary 'Contact us about this service' link after viewing or submitting the quote form

access_methods.description: Accessed when the user clicks a service from Piling or Earthworks Services, passing the service ID in the URL.

pages.name: Earthworks Services
pages.description: Category page listing earthworks services such as bulk excavation, subdivisions, and basements.
primary_functions: List earthworks services (e.g., bulk earthworks, subdivision earthworks, basement excavation)
Provide filters by project type or application (Residential, Industrial, Subdivisions, Basement excavation)
Surface information about typical scopes and durations where relevant (e.g., for subdivisions, basements)
Offer a prominent 'Build Your Package' / 'Custom Earthworks' button leading to the earthworks package configurator
Link to individual service detail pages for more detailed descriptions and quote options

incoming_params.description: Optional earthworks project type to preselect (e.g., 'subdivision','basement_excavation').
Pagination index for the earthworks services listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Build Your Package' / 'Custom Earthworks' button
Click on an earthworks service card title or 'View Details' button

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Earthworks Services' footer link
Linked from Services Overview and Home page earthworks tiles

pages.name: Earthworks Package Configurator
pages.description: Interactive tool to configure a custom earthworks machine-hours package and request a quote.
primary_functions: Allow users to add multiple earthworks items (e.g., Excavation, Haulage/Truck hire, Compaction/Roller hire) with editable machine hours
Automatically calculate and display total machine hours for the package, ensuring it stays under a defined limit (e.g., under 40 hours)
Estimate and display a total package cost so users can confirm it is under their budget (e.g., under $20,000)
Provide a 'Request Quote for This Package' form capturing project name, project description, contact details, and site postcode
Submit a quote request that includes the configured items, hours, and estimated cost

incoming_params.description: Optional project type context (e.g., 'subdivision') to prefill in the package quote request.

outgoing_connections.trigger: User clicks a 'Need help with configuration?' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Earthworks Packages' footer link
Accessed via 'Build Your Package' / 'Custom Earthworks' buttons on Earthworks Services

pages.name: Pile Estimator
pages.description: Calculator for estimating pile quantities and costs for buildings based on size, soil, and usage.
primary_functions: Accept key input parameters such as building length, building width, soil type, and building use/load type
Calculate and display estimated pile quantity and total cost for the piling solution
Highlight whether the total estimated cost is below a threshold (e.g., confirm when it is under $60,000)
Provide a 'Request Detailed Quote' button and form to submit a quote request based on the calculator inputs
Capture project details such as project name, postcode, project type, email, and phone when requesting a detailed quote

incoming_params.description: Optional project type to prefill when opening the estimator (e.g., 'industrial').

outgoing_connections.trigger: User clicks a 'Contact us about this estimate' link after submitting a detailed quote request

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Pile Estimator' item in the main header navigation
Accessed via primary CTAs from the Home page and relevant service pages

pages.name: Equipment Hire Listing
pages.description: Listing page for hireable equipment, including piling rigs and earthmoving machinery.
primary_functions: List hire equipment such as piling rigs, excavators, trucks, and rollers with key specifications
Provide category filters (e.g., Piling rigs) to narrow down equipment by type
Offer rating filters (e.g., 4 stars and above) and price filters/sliders for maximum daily rate (e.g., $1,000/day)
Allow sorting of results by criteria such as price (low to high) to find the cheapest suitable option
Link to equipment detail pages for more information and to begin the hire booking process

incoming_params.description: Optional equipment category to preselect (e.g., 'piling_rigs','excavators').
Minimum average rating filter to apply when loading the list.
Maximum daily rate filter to apply when loading the list.
Sorting option for results (e.g., 'price_asc','price_desc','rating_desc').
Pagination index for the equipment listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an equipment card title or 'View Details' button
Click on a 'Review booking' or cart icon link from the listing toolbar

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Equipment Hire' header navigation item
Accessible via 'Equipment Hire' footer link

pages.name: Equipment Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific piece of hire equipment such as a piling rig.
primary_functions: Display detailed specifications, daily rate, rating, and availability information for the selected equipment
Show pricing clearly, including the per-day cost so users can verify it is under their budget (e.g., under $1,000/day)
Provide an 'Add to Booking' / 'Hire Now' action to start a booking for this equipment
Allow users to specify hire duration (e.g., 3 days) before proceeding to the booking summary
Pass selected equipment and hire duration through to the Hire Booking Summary page

incoming_params.description: Equipment ID used to load full details for the selected item.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Add to Booking' / 'Hire Now' followed by 'Review Booking' button

access_methods.description: Accessed when the user navigates from Equipment Hire listing, passing the equipment ID in the URL.

pages.name: Hire Booking Summary
pages.description: Booking summary / cart page for equipment hire requests.
primary_functions: Display selected hire equipment, daily rate, hire duration (e.g., 3 days), and calculated total cost
Allow users to review and adjust basic booking details if needed (e.g., dates or duration where applicable)
Collect required booking information such as site postcode, contact name, email, and phone number
Provide a 'Confirm Booking Request' action to submit the hire booking for processing

incoming_params.description: Optional source indicator (e.g., 'equipment_detail','equipment_hire') for analytics or UI messaging.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Continue browsing equipment' link
Click on 'Contact us about this booking' link after submission

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Review Booking' / cart CTAs after adding equipment to a booking

pages.name: Projects & Case Studies
pages.description: Project gallery and case studies page with filters and shortlist functionality.
primary_functions: Display a list/grid of completed projects and case studies with key details (type, location, year)
Provide filters for project type (e.g., Basement excavation), location (e.g., Melbourne / VIC region), and completion year range
Allow users to filter projects to find specific sets such as Melbourne basement excavation projects completed between 2020–2023
Offer 'Add to Shortlist' / 'Add to Favourites' / 'Compare' buttons on each project card
Provide a 'View Shortlist' / 'Compare Projects' link to open the Project Shortlist / Comparison page

incoming_params.description: Optional project type filter to apply on load (e.g., 'basement_excavation').
Optional location filter to apply on load (e.g., 'melbourne','vic_melbourne_region').
Optional lower bound for completion year filter.
Optional upper bound for completion year filter.
Pagination index for project listings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Shortlist' / 'Compare Projects' button after adding projects

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Projects' header navigation item
Accessible via 'Projects' footer link

pages.name: Project Shortlist / Comparison
pages.description: Page for viewing and comparing shortlisted projects.
primary_functions: Display all projects added to the shortlist with their titles, locations, types, and completion years
Allow users to confirm the presence of a desired number of projects (e.g., exactly three shortlisted projects)
Provide options to remove items from the shortlist or adjust the comparison set
Serve as a reference view that can remain open while users review or discuss shortlisted projects

incoming_params.description: Optional shortlist identifier; if omitted, the current shortlist from local storage is used.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to all projects' link

access_methods.description: Accessed from 'View Shortlist' / 'Compare Projects' links on the Projects page

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Information about the company, its experience, and service coverage.
primary_functions: Provide background on the company’s history, experience with piling and earthworks, and areas served
Highlight capabilities such as residential, commercial, and industrial projects including basements and subdivisions
Offer a pathway to contact the company for general enquiries or project discussions

params.subject: General enquiry from About Us page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact us' CTA within About Us content

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About Us' footer link

pages.name: Safety & Quality / Certifications
pages.description: Page detailing safety, quality, and environmental systems and certifications.
primary_functions: List formal certifications clearly, including an item referencing 'ISO 45001 Occupational Health & Safety Management System' (or equivalent wording)
Explain the company’s safety management practices and quality assurance processes
Provide context for clients concerned about safety compliance and risk management
Offer a clear link or CTA to the Contact page for safety compliance and certification-related enquiries

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Ask us about our safety compliance' CTA after reviewing certifications

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Safety & Quality' footer link

pages.name: Resources & FAQ Listing
pages.description: Central hub for FAQs, guides, and resource articles related to piling and earthworks.
primary_functions: Provide search functionality and/or category filters to find specific topics (e.g., 'subdivision earthworks', 'basement excavation')
List FAQs and resource articles with titles and summaries, grouped by topic
Allow users to click through to full resource articles or FAQs on the Resource Article / FAQ Detail page
Help users self-serve information such as typical timelines, processes, and technical explanations

incoming_params.description: Optional search query string to pre-populate the resources search field.
Optional resource category filter (e.g., 'faq','guide').
Optional topic keyword to filter resources (e.g., 'subdivision earthworks').
Pagination index for resource listings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a resource / FAQ title from the listing
Click on contextual 'Request callback' or 'Contact us' CTA in the sidebar

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Resources & FAQ' header navigation item
Accessible via 'Resources & FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Resource Article / FAQ Detail
pages.description: Detail page showing the full content of a specific FAQ or resource article.
primary_functions: Present the full text of an FAQ or article, including any stated typical durations for projects (e.g., multi-lot or 10-lot subdivision earthworks)
Allow users to scroll through and identify key guidance such as schedule ranges and process steps
Offer contextual CTAs such as 'Request Callback' or 'Contact Us' for users who need project-specific guidance
Link back to the Resources & FAQ Listing page for further browsing

incoming_params.description: ResourceArticle ID used to load the full FAQ or article content.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to all resources' link
Click on 'Request Callback' CTA below the article content

access_methods.description: Accessed from Resources listing by passing the article ID as a URL parameter.

pages.name: Contact & Enquiry
pages.description: Central contact page with general enquiry, safety compliance, and callback request forms.
primary_functions: Provide a general enquiry form with a subject/enquiry-type field where users can select or type 'Safety compliance'
Allow users to submit messages that reference specific certifications and standards (e.g., including the text 'ISO 45001' in the message)
Collect contact details (name, email, phone) required to respond to enquiries
Offer a 'Request Callback' form or section for users to provide their name, phone number, project description, and preferred contact time window (e.g., 9:30–10:30 AM)
Serve as the main endpoint for all enquiry types, including safety, project quotes, and schedule questions

incoming_params.description: Preselected enquiry type (e.g., 'safety_compliance','quote_enquiry','general_enquiry','callback_request').
Optional subject line to prefill in the contact form.
Optional certification code (e.g., 'ISO 45001') used to prefill safety-compliance enquiries.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' header navigation item
Accessible via 'Contact & Enquiries' footer link
Linked contextually from multiple pages for enquiries and callback requests

pages.name: Site Inspection Booking
pages.description: Online booking form to schedule on-site inspections for piling and earthworks services.
primary_functions: Allow users to enter a site postcode (e.g., 2000) to determine or select the nearest branch
Provide a branch/location dropdown pre-populated or filtered by proximity to the entered postcode
Offer a service type selector including options such as 'Retaining wall piling' for focused site inspections
Include a date picker to select inspection dates, with navigation to future months and selection of specific days (e.g., the 15th of next month)
Display available time slots for the chosen date and allow users to select a time (e.g., 10:00 AM)
Collect contact information (name, phone, email) and optional notes (e.g., 'Retaining wall along rear boundary')
Provide a 'Confirm Booking' / 'Submit Inspection Request' button to complete the site inspection scheduling

incoming_params.description: Optional postcode to prefill in the booking form when coming from a location-specific CTA.
Optional site inspection service type to preselect (e.g., 'retaining_wall_piling').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Need help? Contact us' link on the booking page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Book Site Inspection' header navigation item
Accessible via 'Book Site Inspection' footer link
Linked via prominent CTAs on the Home and Services pages

Contact forms for general, safety compliance, and callback enquiries

footer_links.description: Learn about the company’s background and experience
View safety certifications and systems, including ISO 45001
Browse all piling and earthworks service categories
View detailed piling service options and request quotes
Explore earthworks offerings such as subdivisions and basements
Configure a custom earthworks machine-hours package and request a quote
